task.title: Expand guided upgrade flow beyond profile-schema migration.

context.problem_statement: Future kit updates need a clearer operator path for reviewing conflicts and applying richer upgrades safely beyond profile-config metadata migration.
background: AGW-060 is the final open backlog item after AGW-059 closeout.
repo-contract-kit already has update-plan, kit update --dry-run, kit update, kit doctor, conflict reports under .doc-contract-kit/updates, and metadata-only migrate-config.
Current Codex_CodeReview backlog status is 1 open, 100 done, 0 partial; AGW-060 is selected next.
AGW-059 is committed in repo-contract-kit as 4c829a3 and dogfooded in Codex_CodeReview as 109ab88.
non_goals: Do not add automatic conflict resolution or force overwrite behavior.
Do not mutate target-owned files outside existing explicit update commands.
Do not add hosted update services, PR creation, branch protection changes, or external account writes.
Do not replace update-plan, update, doctor, or migrate-config; make the operator path clearer over those commands.

previous_task_state.notes: AGW-060 may start after this packet commit; no active sibling tasks or dirty files were reported before packet creation.

closeout_required_before_start.reason: The prior task is committed in both repos, kit-status is current, and task-status reports no active tasks or coordination warnings.
closeout_required_before_start.required_next_step: Commit this AGW-060 packet, then implement only the scoped repo-contract-kit guided-upgrade docs/CLI/tests work.

goal_alignment.repo_goal: repo-contract-kit provides safe, explicit target-repo setup, status, update, conflict review, and verification flows.

area_contracts.purpose: Public CLI and safe managed update behavior.
area_contracts.source: AGW-060 backlog row; README.md; tests/test_repo_contract_kit_cli.py; tests/test_update.py
area_contracts.notes: Prefer docs/help/report improvements over new mutation semantics.

area_contracts.purpose: Operator guidance for status, dry-run, conflict review, update, doctor, and verification.
area_contracts.notes: Guidance should make the safe order obvious.

area_contracts.purpose: Regression coverage for CLI help, update reports, and operator output.
area_contracts.notes: Add tests if a CLI command or report output changes.

stop_conditions: Stop if the change would automatically accept conflicts or overwrite customized managed files.
Stop if the change requires hosted accounts, network calls, PRs, or branch mutations.
Stop if the scope becomes a general package manager or application migration framework.

protected_files: Destructive git commands, forced cleanups, and automatic conflict acceptance.
Target-owned files except through existing explicit update/proposal mechanisms.
Hosted PRs, branch protections, issue trackers, labels, queues, or external accounts.
expected_outputs: A clearer guided upgrade path for status, dry-run, conflict review, update, doctor, and verification.
Docs or CLI help that explain conflict report review and safe next actions.
Tests for any new installed file, help text, report output, or CLI behavior.
Version/changelog updates in repo-contract-kit, followed by dogfood and final backlog closeout in Codex_CodeReview.

phase_files.reason: This should be a bounded final backlog item over existing update machinery.

phases.title: Guided Upgrade Flow
phases.objective: Clarify and validate the guided upgrade path, then dogfood and close the final backlog item.
allowed_scope: Codex_CodeReview dogfood metadata and backlog closeout files
completion_evidence: Codex_CodeReview kit-status and backlog checks pass
phases.handoff_notes: Do not broaden into automatic conflict application or hosted update automation.

acceptance_criteria.description: Operators have a clear safe upgrade sequence from status through dry-run, conflict review, update, doctor, and verification.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Review docs/CLI help for an ordered flow that preserves customized files and target-owned boundaries.

acceptance_criteria.description: Conflict reports and proposed replacements are explained as review artifacts, not auto-apply instructions.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Review docs/report guidance and tests if output changes.

acceptance_criteria.description: Existing profile-schema migration remains one step inside the broader upgrade flow.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Confirm docs still mention migrate-config/metadata-only for profile config schema cases.

acceptance_criteria.description: No destructive update behavior or external hosted mutation is added.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Review code diff and tests for no force overwrite, reset, clean, PR, branch, or external account behavior.

commands.command: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 -m unittest tests.test_repo_contract_kit_cli tests.test_update tests.test_install

commands.expected_result: repo-contract-kit VERSION and CHANGELOG are valid
Codex_CodeReview dogfood install updates safely from the local kit checkout

commands.command: make backlog-check && make backlog-split-check && make backlog-status && make agent-next
commands.expected_result: Codex_CodeReview backlog reports zero open items after closeout
Codex_CodeReview reports the dogfooded kit version/source ref

commands.command: make docs-check && make version-check && git diff --check

evidence_to_capture: Focused and full repo-contract-kit validation output
Evidence that conflicts remain review-only unless explicit update applies safe managed changes
Final backlog status showing zero open items

readiness_check.command: make agent-task-ready TASK=AGW-060 TASK_READY_JSON=1 or record why unavailable
readiness_check.expected_result: readiness passes or a blocker is recorded before handoff

lifecycle_action.command: make agent-task-finalize TASK=AGW-060 TASK_RECEIPT=.agent-workflows/tasks/AGW-060/receipt.json TASK_FINALIZE_JSON=1 or durable fallback receipt
lifecycle_action.expected_result: task metadata is terminal and final receipt is linked, or fallback receipt is documented

final_task_status.expected_result: terminal task state, receipt path, and active overlaps are visible or unavailable state is explained

closeout_preview.expected_result: closeout preview reports expected changes; applying closeout requires explicit approval

closeout_requirements.dirty_state_explanation: Final handoff must classify any remaining dirty files in both repo-contract-kit and Codex_CodeReview.

docs_impact.notes: This task changes operator upgrade guidance.

known_risks: Upgrade guidance could imply conflict reports should be auto-applied.
CLI changes could accidentally change update mutability semantics.
Docs could duplicate or conflict with update-plan and migrate-config guidance.
Final closeout must prove no open backlog rows remain rather than assuming completion.
stop_conditions: Stop if implementation requires destructive git cleanup or force overwrite.
Stop if implementation requires hosted accounts or external mutation.
Stop if update semantics change without explicit tests and docs.

approval.notes: Approved by the user's serial backlog execution request.

token_budget.notes: No explicit token budget for the active goal.

dependencies: Commit this packet before editing repo-contract-kit.
Commit repo-contract-kit implementation before dogfood closeout in Codex_CodeReview.
